text: Indeed, We sent it [i.e., the Qur’ān] down during the Night of Decree.
And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
tl: Lailatul qadri khairum min alfee shahr

text: The angels and the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
tl: Tanaz-zalul malaa-ikatu war-roohu feeha bi-izni rab-bihim min kulli amr

text: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
